_description: Transparent-background overlay for compositing on video or images in vertical short-form formats (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts). All text is positioned within the platform-safe zone — avoiding the top status bar, bottom caption/nav area, and right-side action buttons. Export as PNG with transparency and layer in your editor. Keep ink consistent across slides; vary only accent.

_slots.headline: REQUIRED — main heading text. 1–8 words. Rendered at 96px bold inside the safe zone (vertically centered). Avoid very long phrases — the safe zone is 732px wide.
_slots.eyebrow: optional — short uppercase tag above the headline (e.g. 'EPISODE 04', 'TIP'). Monospace, accent-colored. 1–3 words.
_slots.caption: optional — supporting line below the headline. 1–2 short sentences. Slightly smaller and translucent.
_slots.accent: optional — accent hex color for eyebrow and rule. VARY per slide for visual interest. Default: #e8b86d
_slots.ink: optional — primary text hex color. White (#ffffff) for dark video, dark (#1a1714) for light video. Keep SAME across all slides. Default: #ffffff
_slots.shadow-strength: optional — text shadow opacity 0–1. Raise for bright/busy footage (0.8–1.0), lower for dark footage (0.3–0.5). Default: 0.7

title: Video Overlay Series

slides.headline: The art of showing up
slides.caption: Consistency beats intensity — every single time.

slides.headline: Less noise, more signal
slides.caption: Cut everything that doesn't serve the story.
